image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if the rain falling on you was more acidic than battery acid?
Context visual: Sulfur and nitrogen oxides, released from factories and cars, mix with water vapor, creating acid rain.
Escalation visual: This rain can harm plants, fish, and even the structures we build.
Evidence visual: But there's good news! Regulations have significantly reduced these emissions in many regions.
Payoff visual: Research shows ecosystems are bouncing back, thanks to these efforts.
Cta visual: Want to learn more about how we can protect our planet? Follow for more!
